reviews.comment:
Todo bien,menos la atención. La persona que atiende en la cafetería es un maleducado y ni siquiera te mira cuando le haces una pregunta. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, except for the service. The person who works in the cafeteria is rude and doesn't even look at you when you ask a question. The restrooms were very clean.
